_comment: Add models you want on the cross-family panel below. Set enabled:true once the command is correct for your machine. 'family' groups same-lab models so they don't count as independent votes. Use 'stdin': true if the CLI reads the prompt from stdin instead of an argument. Keep API keys in the ENVIRONMENT, never in this file. The panel auto-detects which enabled backends actually resolve on this box; unreachable ones are skipped.
